name: Grounded Hand Soap 5L
description: Keep every handwash clean, safe, and sustainable with Grounded’s 5-liter Castile Hand Soap Refill. Made from natural plant oils—including coconut, canola and sunflower—this concentrated formula delivers a luxurious foam that lifts away dirt while protecting your skin’s natural moisture. Perfect for homes, offices, schools, restaurants and high-traffic spaces, each 5L refill is designed to last significantly longer than standard gel soaps, offering hundreds of washes per container. Choose from pure unscented or essential-oil-infused options for a naturally refreshing cleanse. Crafted without sulfates, parabens, synthetic fragrances or harsh chemicals, this non-toxic soap is safe for families and gentle enough for daily use. Its biodegradable ingredients and refillable packaging help reduce plastic waste, making it a smart, planet-friendly choice. Why You’ll Love It Long-lasting value — Concentrated formula provides many more washes than typical liquid soaps. Gentle + effective — Cleans thoroughly while keeping hands soft. Eco-friendly — Refillable, biodegradable and packaged with recycled materials. Non-toxic — Free from SLS, parabens, and synthetic fragrances. Perfect for high-use environments — Ideal for multiple dispensers or large households. A cleaner home. A lighter footprint. A better way to wash.
